signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling a reversal from the prior 5-month low.[2] This follows January's 2% reading (or 2.01%) and aligns with the Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook amid Middle East energy
